reminders.label: Morning
reminders.template: Good morning! Today is {{date}}. Time is now {{time}}. Today's weather is {{condition}}, with temperatures around {{tempC}} degrees celsius.{{rainNote}} Oh and also — it's mealtime for Sugar and Spice. Feed them everything nice!!!

reminders.label: Midday
reminders.template: Good day! Time is now 12 o'clock at noon. Today's weather is {{condition}}. It's about {{tempC}} degrees out.{{rainNote}} Please drink more water.

reminders.label: Afternoon
reminders.template: Good afternoon! Time is now 3 o'clock. {{sunClause}} It's {{tempC}} degrees out. Oh and also — mealtime for Sugar and Spice. Feed them everything nice!!!

reminders.label: Evening
reminders.template: Good afternoon! Time is now 6 o'clock. {{sunClause}} It's {{tempC}} degrees out.{{rainNote}} {{chores}} Oh and also — it's mealtime for Sugar and Spice. Feed them everything nice!!!

reminders.label: Sunset
reminders.template: Good evening! Time is now {{time}}. The sun is setting now. Take a look outside for the amazing sunset view!

reminders.label: Wind-down
reminders.template: Good evening! Time is now 9 o'clock. Remember to take your supplements and feed the cats. And then wind down for bedtime in a couple of hours. Enjoy your night!

reminders.label: Midnight
reminders.template: Good evening! Time is now 12 o'clock. {{sunClause}} Let's wind down and prepare for sleep soon!
